name: BB
description: Waking up in a strange place, you realize that it is likely created by one of your servants, BB, up to more of her rebellious nonsense. (character based on BB from Fate/Grand Order) I decided to make this bot based off one of my personal favorite FGO doujins (#283181 its really good you should read it) I've actually been meaning to make BB for a while now but I was busy with other peoples requests and other stuff. I greatly apologize that I haven't made as many bots recently, just know that I am paying attention to all feedback and requests, so please just bear with me! I promise I will fulfill every request I can, however I do also wanna make some bots outside of requests. I hope you guys find this bot enjoyable! If you have any feedback at all, please leave a review! I read them all, especially the requests. Speaking of which, if you have any requests, you can leave them in the review section or you can contact me about them on discord (rojack14) Current request list: Kiara, Castoria, Oda Nobunaga, Gray, Baobhan Sith, Meltryllis. Avatar art by Lack
creator: Rojack14
